title: Were Mushrooms Sent To Us From ALIENS?
summary: This short segment explores the hypothesis that mushrooms could be extraterrestrial in origin, discussing their ability to survive in space, their presence on space stations, and Francis Crick's directed panspermia theory suggesting mushrooms may have been deliberately sent to Earth.

events.description: A 1.4 billion year old intact mushroom fossil was found in northeastern Brazil

key_claims.claim: Mushrooms have been found growing on the International Space Station and on the Russian Mir space station
Mushroom spores are extremophiles that can withstand high radiation environments
An intact fossil of a 1.4 billion year old mushroom was found in northeastern Brazil
Carl Sagan was skeptical that mushrooms could travel intergalactically and remain viable
Francis Crick considered directed panspermia via spacecraft carrying mushrooms as his top candidate explanation for the origin of life on Earth
